ArmGuards.Name: Arm Guards
ArmGuards.Description: Protective gear for the arms, offering moderate defense against slashing and blunt attacks.

CalRing.Name: Doom Ring
CalRing.Description: A cursed ring that attracts peril.

ChainHat.Name: Chain Coif
ChainHat.Description: A protective headgear made of interlinked metal rings, providing good defense against slashing attacks.

Chainmail.Name: Chainmail
Chainmail.Description: A type of armor made of interlocking metal rings, providing good protection against slashing attacks.

ClothHat.Name: Cloth Hood
ClothHat.Description: A padded cloth hood that offers slight protection from blunt strikes and cold weather.

CoolHat.Name: Stylish Hat
CoolHat.Description: A fashionable hat that adds a touch of style to your outfit. Provides negligible protection, but boosts confidence.

FireSword.Name: Flaming Sword
FireSword.Description: A sword engulfed in magical flames, dealing extra fire damage on hit.

IronHelm.Name: Iron Helm
IronHelm.Description: A sturdy iron helmet that provides solid protection against slashing attacks.

IronLegs.Name: Iron Greaves
IronLegs.Description: Heavy iron leg armor over cloth that offers good protection, but slows movement.

KnightShield.Name: Heater Shield
KnightShield.Description: A sturdy metal shield that provides excellent protection against physical attacks, but is heavy and cumbersome.

LeatherArmor.Name: Leather Armor
LeatherArmor.Description: Light armor made from treated animal hides, providing basic protection while allowing for greater mobility.

Longsword.Name: Longsword
Longsword.Description: A versatile sword that can be used for both slashing and thrusting attacks. Offers a good balance of speed and power.

Mace.Name: Mace
Mace.Description: A blunt weapon with a heavy head, designed to crush armor and bones.

InitiateHood.Name: Initiate's Hood
InitiateHood.Description: A simple hood worn by novice magic users, enchanted with minor protection from the elements and magical attacks.

InitiateRobe.Name: Initiate's Robe
InitiateRobe.Description: A simple robe worn by novice magic users, enchanted with minor protection from the elements and magical attacks.

InitiateStaff.Name: Initiate's Staff
InitiateStaff.Description: A simple wooden staff, suitable for basic magical attacks and self-defense.

PlateArmor.Name: Plate Armor
PlateArmor.Description: Heavy armor made of large metal plates, offering excellent protection from blades but reducing mobility.

RegenRing.Name: Regen Ring
RegenRing.Description: A magical ring that slowly regenerates the wearer's health over time.

Shortsword.Name: Shortsword
Shortsword.Description: A basic sword, light and easy to handle. Suitable for slashing or thrusting.

Spear.Name: Spear
Spear.Description: A long pole weapon with a pointed tip, ideal for thrusting attacks and keeping enemies at a distance.
